name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: White House official declares the U.S. will get “all of the oil” in Iran out of the hands of the regime.

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: Official 𝕏 account for the Syrian Government has deleted a series of tweets from last night. https://t.co/uCzLoZs4G9

name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: Iran’s interim president apologizes to neighboring countries, claims it will stop military action if they stop helping the US.
